title: VGRDTM Happy Birthday Balloons, Black Balloons, Birthday Balloon for Men, 25pcs Black Decorations Set with 16" Foil Letters & Confetti Balloon for Adults Women Girls Boys Party Supplies
features: COMPLETE BLACK BIRTHDAY DECOR SET:Includes 13x 16-inch "HAPPY BIRTHDAY" foil letter balloons, 2x 18-inch black heart foil balloons, 5x classic black latex balloons and 5x sparkling black confetti latex balloons. Bonus straw included for easy inflation.

ELEGANT THEME FOR ALL CELEBRATIONS:Sophisticated black colour scheme suits men's birthday parties, women's gatherings, gender-reveal events, anniversaries and milestone celebrations. Perfect for teens and adults seeking stylish decorations.

QUICK ASSEMBLY WITH INCLUDED ACCESSORY:Pre-attached strings and lightweight materials allow fast setup. Use the provided straw to effortlessly inflate foil balloons without pumps. Create balloon arches or wall backdrops in under 15 minutes.

PREMIUM DURABLE CONSTRUCTION:Thickened foil resists popping while glitter-confetti latex balloons maintain sparkle. Rounded edges prevent scratching. Ideal for indoor/outdoor parties lasting 12+ hours when kept away from heat sources.

VERSATILE DECORATING POSSIBILITIES:Mix and match components for table centrepieces, photo booth backgrounds or hanging installations. Coordinates with gold/silver party supplies. Ships in protective packaging to prevent transit damage.
description: Product description Transform your space with VGRDTM's sophisticated black birthday balloon set. This 25-piece decorations bundle combines matte, metallic and glitter elements for dimensional party styling. What's Included: 13x Foil Letter Balloons (16-inch): Spell "HAPPY BIRTHDAY" with durable aluminium-film balloons 2x Heart Foil Balloons (18-inch): Bold black accents with reinforced seams 5x Classic Latex Balloons (12-inch): Deep matte black for texture contrast 5x Confetti Latex Balloons (12-inch): Clear balloons filled with black glitter flakes 1x Inflation Straw : For convenient foil balloon setup Design Notes: The monochrome palette creates modern party aesthetics suitable for adult birthdays. Pair with metallic accents for luxe tablescapes or use solo for dramatic photo backdrops. Safety Information: WARNING: To avoid danger of suffocation, keep uninflated or broken balloons away from children under 3 years. Discard broken balloons immediately. Latex may cause allergic reactions. Safety Warning No
